tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij kazdy z ponizszych dialogow (1.1-1.6), wybierajac odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem:
X: Have you finished your history essay yet?
Y: _________
options: A) Not yet. I've been working on it all weekend, though.
B) Not yet. I work on it all weekend, though.
C) Not yet. I'm working on it all weekend, though.

items.stem:
X: I'm finding the chemistry course really hard to keep up with.
Y: _________
options: A) Have you thought about joining the study group?
B) Have you thought to join the study group?
C) Did you think about joining the study group?

items.stem:
X: I can't believe I failed the maths test again.
Y: _________
options: A) Cheer up. You can't have revised hard enough, but you'll do better next time.
B) Cheer up. You can't have revised hardly enough, but you'll do better next time.
C) Cheer up. You may not have revised hard enough, but you'll do better next time.

items.stem:
X: The teacher said we need to hand in our projects by Friday.
Y: _________
options: A) I know. It's about time we got started.
B) I know. It's about time we get started.
C) I know. It's about time we start.

items.stem:
X: Do you think I should switch from physics to biology?
Y: _________
options: A) It depends on what career you're hoping to pursue.
B) It depends on what career you hope pursuing.
C) It depends what career you're hoping to pursue.

items.stem:
X: I've just been offered a place at the University of Edinburgh!
Y: _________
options: A) Congratulations! You should be really proud of yourself.
B) Congratulations! You should be really proud of you.
C) Congratulations! You ought to be really proud of yourself.
